slice: New standalone developer utility at tools/platform-status/ — Platform Health, Repository/Theme Registry/Studio stats via new ThemeRepositoryClient.getStats()/reset(), and a confirmation-gated Repository Reset action; fixed a real pre-existing bug where _resolveAssets() only listed one Storage folder level (nested assets like assets/textures/linen.png never resolved); added the delete RLS policies Reset requires to supabase/schema.sql
